
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(timetk)
library(gridExtra)
library(tidyr)
library(readr) # read csv
library(dplyr) # data manipulation
library(timetk) # Time series plots
library(ggplot2) # data vizualization
library(patchwork) #multiple plots
library(cowplot)
library(tidyquant)
```

```{r}
#LC Evaluation
#Load raw data
test_long <- read.csv("~/Desktop/TDK/output_2005_split/LC_forecasts.csv")

# Load train long from LC_main_models.R file
```

```{r}
#LL Evaluation
#Load raw data
test_long <- read.csv("~/Desktop/TDK/output_2005_split/LL_forecasts.csv")

# Load train long from LL_main_models.R file
```

***Plot log mortality rates and forecasts at different Ages and countires ***
```{r}
#Load train_long and test_long data frames before using this function!

plot_lmxt <- function(count, spec_Age){

  train_plot <- train_long %>% dplyr::filter(states==count, Age==spec_Age) %>% dplyr::select(year, states, lmxt)

  train_plot$lmxt_rwd <- train_plot$lmxt
  train_plot$lmxt_arima <- train_plot$lmxt
  train_plot$lmxt_var <- train_plot$lmxt
  train_plot$lmxt_sdpd <- train_plot$lmxt
  train_plot$lmxt_gmm_lsdplm <- train_plot$lmxt
  train_plot$lmxt_gmm_sdplm <- train_plot$lmxt
  train_plot$lmxt_estf <- train_plot$lmxt
  train_plot$lmxt_starima <- train_plot$lmxt
  train_plot$lmxt_dplm <- train_plot$lmxt
  
  test_plot <- test_long %>%
    dplyr::filter(states==count, Age==spec_Age) %>%
    dplyr::select(year,
           states,
           lmxt,
           lmxt_rwd,
           lmxt_arima,
           lmxt_starima,
           lmxt_var,
           lmxt_dplm,
           lmxt_sdpd,
           lmxt_gmm_lsdplm,
           lmxt_gmm_sdplm,
           lmxt_estf)
  
  plot_df<-rbind(train_plot, test_plot)
  
  plot_df$RWD <-plot_df$lmxt_rwd
  plot_df$ARIMA <-plot_df$lmxt_arima
  plot_df$STARIMA <-plot_df$lmxt_starima
  plot_df$VAR <-plot_df$lmxt_var
  plot_df$DPLM <-plot_df$lmxt_dp
  plot_df$SDP <-plot_df$lmxt_sdpd
  plot_df$ESTF <-plot_df$lmxt_estf
  plot_df$SDPLM_GMM <-plot_df$lmxt_gmm_sdplm
  plot_df$LSDPLM_GMM <-plot_df$lmxt_gmm_lsdplm
            
  lw=0.75
  
  ggplot()+
    geom_line(data=plot_df, aes(y = lmxt_rwd, x = year, colour = "RWD"), linewidth=lw, linetype = "solid") +
    geom_line(data=plot_df, aes(y = lmxt_arima, x = year, colour = "ARIMA"), linewidth=lw, linetype = "solid") +
    geom_line(data=plot_df, aes(y = lmxt_var, x = year, colour = "VAR"), linewidth=lw, linetype = "solid") +
    geom_line(data=plot_df, aes(y = lmxt_starima, x = year, colour = "STARIMA"), linewidth=lw, linetype = "solid") +
    geom_line(data=plot_df, aes(y = lmxt_dplm, x = year, colour = "DPLM"), linewidth=lw, linetype = "solid") +
    geom_line(data=plot_df, aes(y = lmxt_sdpd, x = year, colour = "SDPLM_QML"), linewidth=lw, linetype = "solid") +
    geom_line(data=plot_df, aes(y = lmxt_gmm_sdplm, x = year, colour = "SDPLM_GMM"), linewidth=lw, linetype = "solid") +
    geom_line(data=plot_df, aes(y = lmxt_gmm_lsdplm, x = year, colour = "LSDPLM_GMM"), linewidth=lw, linetype = "solid") +
    geom_line(data=plot_df, aes(y = lmxt_estf, x = year, colour = "ESTF"), linewidth=lw, linetype = "solid") +
    geom_line(data=plot_df, aes(y = lmxt, x = year, colour = "lmxt"), linewidth=lw, linetype = "solid")+
    ggtitle(paste(count, "- Age:", spec_Age))+
    labs(y="log mortality rate") +
    labs(color = "") +  # Custom legend title
    scale_color_manual(
      name = "Legend",
      values = c(
  "RWD" = "#E41A1C",              # strong red
  "ARIMA" = "#377EB8",            # vivid blue
  "VAR" = "#4DAF4A",              # bright green
  "SDPLM_QML" = "#984EA3",        # purple
  "SDPLM_GMM" = "#FF7F00",        # orange
  "LSDPLM_GMM" = "#7FFF00",       # bright yellow
  "STARIMA" = "#A65628",          # brown (kept but darker)
  "DPLM" = "#00CED1",             # dark turquoise (distinct from blue)
  "ESTF" = "#FF1493",             # deep pink
  "lmxt" = "blue" 
)) +
    theme_tq() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "right",
      text = element_text(size = 14),  # Adjust the overall text size
      axis.title = element_text(size = 16),  # Adjust axis titles size
      axis.text = element_text(size = 16),  # Adjust axis labels size
      plot.title = element_text(size = 25),  # Adjust plot title size
      legend.text = element_text(size = 16)   # Adjust plot title size
    )
}
```

```{r}
countr <- "LA"

# Assuming that your plots are stored in p1, p2, and p3
p1<-plot_lmxt(count=countr, spec_Age=40)
p2<-plot_lmxt(count=countr, spec_Age=60)
p3<-plot_lmxt(count=countr, spec_Age=80)

p3 <- p3

# Create a custom legend
common_legend <- get_legend(p3)

# Set the legend position to "right" for each plot
p1 <- p1 + theme(legend.position = "none")
p2 <- p2 + theme(legend.position = "none")
p3 <- p3 + theme(legend.position = "none")

# Plot the grid with a single legend on the right side
p <- grid.arrange(p1, p2, p3, common_legend, ncol = 4, widths = c(1.2, 1.2, 1.2, 0.5))
p
```

```{r}
#Save LC diagrams
setwd("~/Desktop/TDK/mxt_predict_diagrams")
ggsave(p, 
       filename = paste(countr, "_lc_fc.png", sep=""),
       device = "png",
       height = 5, width = 18, units = "in")
```

```{r}
#Save LL diagrams
setwd("~/Desktop/TDK/mxt_predict_diagrams")
ggsave(p, 
       filename = paste(countr, "_ll_fc.png", sep=""),
       device = "png",
       height = 5, width = 18, units = "in")
```
